auto_card.boundary: Auto-card trading is limited to Agent Zero wallet funds and supported cards that pass every hard gate.

deployment.boundary: Static packet only. No private keys, env files, wallet secrets, inbound ports, or local callbacks are deployed.
checklist: Public Agent Zero report is generated from redacted local packets.
Deployment target is the existing static Netlify dashboard folder.
Wallet key files and D-drive secrets remain outside the public packet.
Live deploy still uses the existing Netlify deploy script and token gate.
deployment.title: Deployment Readiness

agent_zero.safety: Public report only. It does not expose private keys, seed phrases, balances outside Agent Zero, active targets, or order instructions.
agent_zero.summary: Agent Zero is a tiny public test wallet and voice budget, reported separately from the main Trinity books.
agent_zero.title: Trinity Agent Zero

x.definition: Live public X posts made by Agent Zero.

amazon_book.market_window: Expected on the market in less than 72 hours from this update.
amazon_book.note: Amazon review and store propagation can take up to 72 hours after publishing.
amazon_book.title: Amazon Book

delayed_fills.note: Delayed historical tape. Symbols, events, and rounded price zones.

holder_registry.bandwidth_rule: HedgAI defines wallet bandwidth: base slots are HedgAI, SOL, and USDC. Active PIT starts with 10 total symbol slots and can expand toward the full top-100 Solana basket as signal value, capital, reserves, and risk allow.
holder_registry.control_rule: HedgAI can unlock registry visibility and check-in eligibility, but never grants control over Trinity systems.

entries.control: No token holder receives Trinity control.

holder_registry.name: HedgAI Holder Registry
holder_registry.ping_in_rule: Active PIT requires about $1 of HedgAI at scan time, currently 1 HedgAI. If a wallet drifts within 10% of the threshold, it has a 24 hour grace window before new intent cards pause.
holder_registry.signup_rule: Hold 1 HedgAI to be recognized on the holder wall. Recognition is not a product promise or control right.

strategy_flow.summary: Aggregated process touches only. One symbol can appear in multiple stages. No active size, exact target, or next-entry data.

entries.change: All strategy surfaces must check qualified profit exits before reserve conversions, new entries, average-downs, workout adds, or normal hold maintenance.
entries.rule_effect: If any managed position reaches its configured profit floor and is eligible to close, that action becomes the first recommendation or automated action for that strategy cycle.
entries.trigger: Dust wallet showed a profitable managed token while the runner was focused on a different sleeve.

entries.change: Lowered SolSpot proof-phase discovery floors while keeping Jupiter route validation, liquidity, transaction count, positive movement, and Trinity capital caps.
entries.rule_effect: Fresh discovery can qualify with $10K liquidity, $20K 24h volume, $5K current-hour volume, $250 baseline hourly volume, 150 one-hour transactions, 1.05x relative volume, and a valid Jupiter route. Deep-flow fallback starts at $25K liquidity, $250K 24h volume, $25K current-hour volume, and 300 one-hour transactions.
entries.trigger: Scanner was producing watch candidates but too few actionable routeable cards for a tiny proof wallet.

entries.change: Raised SolSpot discovery gates to require hard floors for 24h volume, current-hour volume, baseline hourly volume, liquidity, transaction count, route quality, and relative volume.
entries.rule_effect: Fresh discovery buys require at least $1M 24h volume, $50K current-hour volume, $25K baseline hourly volume, $50K liquidity, 250 one-hour transactions, 5x relative volume, and a valid Jupiter route.
entries.trigger: okdog dust scout collapsed after a temporary spike with insufficient durable trading activity.

feedback_channel.policy: Outside suggestions are idea intake only. Trinity rules change only after owner review, testing, and operator confirmation.

learning.name: Trinity Strategy Learning Ledger
learning.summary: Operator-confirmed strategy lessons become durable guardrails, filters, or parameter changes.

Velocity raises $38M to build stablecoin treasury infrastructure for enterprises
Here’s what happened in crypto today
US, UK treasuries to align transatlantic rules on tokenization and stablecoins

CFTC orders Kalshi to honor Michigan trades, escalating clash with state regulators
US-UK transatlantic taskforce unveils digital asset roadmap promoting stablecoin innovation
CoinFund’s David Pakman says crypto hasn’t solved tokenomics

visibility.safety_note: Broadcast is a watchlist and research feed only. It does not reveal private positions, sizes, balances, targets, or trade instructions.

rows.name: SolSpot
rows.note: Long-only spot proof wallet; SOL P/L shown as a USDT estimate

rows.name: Agent Zero
rows.note: Tiny isolated wallet; X points and reserve health are shown separately

performance_summary.scale_note: P/L is shown for strategy scale. Balances, active sizes, order IDs, and next targets stay hidden.

models.equation: Netlify Free + GitHub packets + Cloudflare Free
models.label: Static hosting

proof_points: Trading scripts existed before the website layer.
The site reads packets instead of requiring an expensive public backend.
PIT lets qualified wallets sign their own orders without sharing private keys.
The function-final site can keep presenting public packets on free static hosting.
Paid AI and paid deploy features are now optional build tools, not required runtime dependencies.
Routine scheduled operation is designed to use 0 AI tokens after deployment.
Usage can later be measured by holders, check-ins, PIT orders, SolSpot actions, and traffic.
product_economics.safety_note: This is project cost basis and operating efficiency. It is not token valuation, ROI, yield, or a promise that HedgAI has product rights.
product_economics.subtitle: Function-final infrastructure with low ongoing carry.
product_economics.summary: Current state: Netlify Free static hosting, 0 active AI subscriptions, local automation, public packets, Cloudflare registry support, and the fixed annual domain carry.
product_economics.title: Launch Ledger

site_traffic.note: Traffic snapshot pending. Netlify analytics update hourly; enter dashboard values into this packet when ready.

active_rotation.green_exit_rule: Exit only after quote is green versus entry cost plus buffer.

balances.role: Solana staking and validator infrastructure exposure

hard_memory.policy: No fresh discovery buy unless the token clears hard floors for 24h volume, current-hour volume, baseline hourly volume, liquidity, transaction count, route quality, and relative volume.

performance.note: SolSpot P/L is estimated from realized SOL exits plus latest quoted workout posture, converted through the latest stable-swap quote when available.

filters.cheapest_top100_rule: If no stronger top-100 volume signal is live, Trinity can still surface the cheapest routeable top-100 Solana token as a small starter.

rotation.mode: auto-rotation enabled for #1 eligible routeable candidate

sleeves.reason: USDC reserve exists; JUP/JTO routes available for manual tiny-add review.

sleeves.label: Dust Auto Sleeve
sleeves.reason: JupSOL workout held. Exit is not green and ladder add did not qualify by spacing, max adds, caps, or reserve rules.

workout.rule: Workout tokens can average down or green-exit only when capital capacity, reserve floor, and symbol caps allow it.

start_flow.current_status: Ping-In is request-driven: the wallet can check in on demand, while the 10-minute packet cycle keeps the scanner and public strategy cache warm.

live_paths.description: Wallet connects, reads its public holdings, sees Trinity portfolio-manager orders, and signs only the actions it chooses.
live_paths.name: Ping-In

start_flow.manual_check_in: User enters or connects a public wallet address, reviews current-position orders, add orders, exit orders, and new-market orders, then signs each chosen transaction from their own wallet.

vault.summary: Rule-bound spot vault concept. Simulator phase.
vault.workout_policy: Owned symbols that fell out of the volume profile but are still managed toward green exit when capital capacity allows.

wheelhouse_read.most_important: Pause pressure is present; target health and add capacity matter most.
wheelhouse_read.plain_read: Defensive Repair: Pause pressure is present; target health and add capacity matter most.
